title: Date wise reports in dashboard
excerpt:
Hello Guy’s, I trust find this msg you well. 
One of our customer want to have report by date. They should be able to filter by date even. 
If anyone have solution and share here then will be appreciated. 
I will look fo…

posts.author: HEMAL.SHAH (HEMAL SHAH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Guy’s, I trust find this msg you well.

One of our customer want to have report by date. They should be able to filter by date even.
If anyone have solution and share here then will be appreciated.
I will look forward to a solution.
HEMAL SHAH
HEMAL.SHAH@OPERISOFT.COM

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Hemal, you can always use filter option on board and dashboard to generate reports. If you are looking for something specific let me know.

posts.author: HEMAL.SHAH (HEMAL SHAH)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rehan, Thanks for the reply. But the filter option will provide you the weekly, monthly, kind of rather specific dates. I was asking about to select the specific date if possible.
Thanks.
HEMAL SHAH

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @HEMAL.SHAH .

To show reports only on a specific date, you need to have that data inputted somewhere on your board.

That way, you can use a filter for example " show expense reports where date is 8/8/2023" or " show expense reports where date is between 8/8/2023 and 9/9/2023" .

Hope this helps!

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Valeriia.H (Valeriia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @HEMAL.SHAH @rehan.abdul and everybody who is looking for solution

If i got you right Time in Status app can be helpful for you. App track time the Item has spent in each workflow status. If you want to generate Time in Status report with certain date ranges, you need to set Time range – for data calculation. For this just

  1. Install Time in Status
  2. Choose time range (can be 1 day)
  3. Get your report!

Знімок екрана 2024-10-07 о 18.33.141920×780 84.8 KB

Also you will be able to track how much time your issue spends in each status and much more by generating 3 types of reports:

  • Time in Status Report
  • Status Count Report
  • Transition Count Report

And use charts to visualize your reports a sample of a certain number according to time range/item range, or a single item:

  • Pie Charts
  • Bar Charts
  • Area Charts

The app is also available in the format of board integration.

image1862×924 91.6 KB

You can try it on the Monday Marketplace and share your experience with us.
Hope you find this app helpful.
